name: cf719x242
drl:
rule TJ0 salience 13 when $a : E1() $b : E1(this after[0ms,100ms] $a) then end
rule W1 when accumulate( E0(tag == "x", $t : ts); $c : sum($t) ) then end
rule W2 when accumulate( E0(tag == "x") over window:time(100ms); $c : count() ) then end
rule J3 when $e : E0($t : tag) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RD4 salience 7 when D() then end
rule ND5 salience -7 when not D() P() then end
rule G6 salience 8 when P(v == 2) then insert(new P3(3)); end
rule C7 salience 1 when P3() then end
rule NE8 when exists E1() P() then end
_finding: A2 windowed-accumulate — MECHANISM CRACKED (D-154 recon, port gate-pending): the extra-fire class. The E0 tag-update (z->x at clock 280) makes the never-admitted event (alpha-failed at insert => NO WindowNode RightTuple) take the fresh-ADMISSION path, which checks the INSERT-SNAPSHOT ts against the window (SlidingTimeWindow.assertFact: isExpired(now, startTimestamp) — live ts irrelevant): 22+100 <= 280 => REJECTED, no transient, count stays 0 (oracle fires J3 next; the RightTuple IS created, so a LATER mask-hit update would revive it). The engine admits with no window check and past-due-evicts at quiescence => the transient W2 count=1 extra fire. Same spec/report as xf_cep_winacc_719_34. GRADUATES at the port.
